# uap-pulse

> An MCP server and interactive 3D map over **350 official-government UAP/UFO records**: all four U.S. Pentagon PURSUE releases (war.gov, 2026-05-08 through 2026-07-10) plus curated archives from 12 nations. U.S. records are public domain under 17 U.S.C. § 105. No scraped civilian databases.

## Use it as an MCP server (for AI agents)

Install (no auth, no API key, data bundled):

```
npx -y uap-pulse
```

Add to any MCP client (e.g. Claude Desktop):

```json
{ "mcpServers": { "uap-pulse": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "uap-pulse"] } } }
```

## Tools

- `search_sightings` — search by PURSUE release (1–4), free text, agency, file type, year range, or location
- `search_nearby` — incidents within a radius (km) of a lat/lng, by distance
- `get_sighting` — full record for one file id, with the war.gov source link
- `full_text_search` — relevance-ranked substring search across all descriptions
- `notable_cases` — curated, historically significant cases with context
- `hotspots` — the locations with the most declassified records
- `stats` — totals and breakdowns by release, agency, type, and era
- `timeline` / `timeline_data` — records per decade/year for charts and animations

## Links

- Live map: https://uap-pulse.vercel.app
- Source (GitHub): https://github.com/davidmosiah/uap-pulse
- Package (npm): https://www.npmjs.com/package/uap-pulse
- Raw data (JSON, CORS-open): https://uap-pulse.vercel.app/sightings.json

## Dataset

350 records · 334 U.S. PURSUE files · 16 curated international official cases (12 nations) · 275 geolocated · 20 off-world (Moon/orbit/cislunar) · U.S. agencies: Department of War (171), FBI (87), NASA (40), CIA (21), Department of State (7), Department of Energy (5), ODNI (1), Intelligence Community Agency (1), U.S. Government (1) · years 1944–2026 · source: war.gov PURSUE Releases 1–4 + national archives · U.S. data license: public domain.

Latest release: Release 04 contains 40 files published July 10, 2026. Use `search_sightings` with `{ "release": 4, "limit": 100 }` to retrieve the complete tranche.
